caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold letters, a gold chain, and a gold watch is seated in a studio setting. He wears professional headphones and is positioned in front of a silver microphone on a boom arm. To his left, a white backdrop features a repeating gold star logo with the words "UNICORN HUSTLE." Behind him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk in front of him sits a black device and a blue container with a red label that says "TALK OUT". Across the sequence, the man is engaged in conversation, shifting his head slightly and changing his facial expression while looking toward someone off-screen. His right hand rests on the desk near the microphone. The camera remains static, capturing his subtle movements and gestures during the recording.
